message:
Fix IPv6 bind-host handling and split startup probes for stdio transport

IPv6 fix: Raw addresses like "::1" were formatted as "{host}:{port}"
producing ambiguous socket strings. Switch to tuple-based
TcpListener::bind((host, port)) with a normalization helper that strips
extraneous brackets, fixing port checks and preview server binding on
IPv6-only and dual-stack hosts.

Startup probes: Stdio transport does not bind an HTTP listener, so
running port, http-path, and auth probes caused false-positive warnings.
Extract shared probes (database, db_lock, storage_root, integrity,
fd_limit) into a common function and add run_stdio_startup_probes()
that omits HTTP-only checks. Add integrity probe to shared set for all
transports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
